title: cordula sanderiana
intro: Cordula sanderiana, also known as the 'Blue Sage', is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds such as thujone and borneol, exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The Blue Sage is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, digestive problems, and stress, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cordula sanderiana can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to create topical creams, salves, and aromatherapy products.
